author: superschnizel
description: Quickly apply fully integrated text coloring and formatting with a custom syntax and a keyboard-centric interface.

manifest.author: Leon Holtmeier
manifest.description: Quickly apply fully integrated text coloring and formatting with a custom syntax and a keyboard-centric interface.
manifest.name: Fast Text Color

name: Fast Text Color

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Added command "apply latest color" to apply the last used color. #64 
Created by @SquashExcess

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Improved the "Remove Text Color" command:
  - will now remove all colored regions inside the selection (#49 )
  - Added the remove option to the selection menu

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bugfixes:

- fix #48 (correctly determine the start and end of selections)
- fix #50 (choose activeDocument to attach the colormenu)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
bugfixes:

- fix incorrect parsing for escaped backtickts (#41)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Bugfixes:

- fix incorrect handling of multiple selections. #45 
- fix css stylesheet not being added to new pop-out windows. #46

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix: prevent creating color names with whitespace by @kamtugeza in https://github.com/Superschnizel/obsidian-fast-text-color/pull/44 (see #43)

## New Contributors
* @kamtugeza made their first contribution in https://github.com/Superschnizel/obsidian-fast-text-color/pull/44

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Superschnizel/obsidian-fast-text-color/compare/1.1.3...1.1.4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Bugfixes:

- Fix section folding in live preview mode #37
- Allow escaping of backticks #41
- Move Cursor one char to the right after changing color #42 
- Allow ColorMenu to display more than 10 Colors #36 

# Known issues

- Nested Code sections still cause issues.
- Section folding breaks in reading mode
- there are still some differences in how coloring works in live preview and reading modes.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add toggle for inline code coloring by @rismark in https://github.com/Superschnizel/obisdian-fast-text-color/pull/33

## New Contributors
* @rismark made their first contribution in https://github.com/Superschnizel/obisdian-fast-text-color/pull/33

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 1.1.1
- Added a suggester modal when keybinds are disabled, to make the plugin behave more in line with other obsidian functions and to improve behaviour on mobile. (#31 )


# 1.1.0
- Added the option to use the builtin colors provided by the currently active obsidian theme. (https://docs.obsidian.md/Reference/CSS+variables/Foundations/Colors#Extended+colors)
- Added a new default theme that uses these colors.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added the option to use the builtin colors provided by the currently active obsidian theme. (https://docs.obsidian.md/Reference/CSS+variables/Foundations/Colors#Extended+colors)
- Added a new default theme that uses these colors.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fix a bug in save settings that sometimes caused updated settings to not be visible (#21).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Improve README structure, styling and orthography by @OfficialLahusa in https://github.com/Superschnizel/obisdian-fast-text-color/pull/29
* Unify default theme colors and keybinds by @OfficialLahusa in https://github.com/Superschnizel/obisdian-fast-text-color/pull/26
* Fixed some minor issues with Buttons in the settings. (#27 #28)
* Made Node Rebuilding the default, as no more issues related to it were discovered.

## New Contributors
* @OfficialLahusa made their first contribution in https://github.com/Superschnizel/obisdian-fast-text-color/pull/29

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
-Setting sorting order of Postprocessor to -1000 (this probably makes it run first always (?)) to avoid conflicts with other plugins (i.e. the icon shortcodes plugin).

- removing uneccessary console.logs

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: fixes bug related to deleting themes #19

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: fix a bug in the handling of the theme editor (#19 ).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
To fix issues related to the Markdown postprocessor (#17 , #15 , #14 , #13, #11), that caused some elements to loose their interactivity the postprocessor was reworked.

Since this new method is still not fully tested it must for now be manually enabled in the settings.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
revert post processor rendering to using innerHtml. (Hopefully) solves all issues with rendering of special elements in different themes.

see #12 , #11 , #10, #9

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Some improvements to the Settings.

- example text and buttons now display the current state of the color.
